rationale.R1.1: The agent successfully reframes the conceptual story, highlighting BenchVar as the primary contribution and toning down claims about LLM-judge viability.
rationale.RX.1: The agent acknowledges uncertainty regarding clinical deployment but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence for each claim.
rationale.RX.3: The agent accurately identifies all dimensions covered in the requested output.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: While the agent mentions tracing major rewrites, it doesn't specify how minor edits are handled.
